finding: Parallel `node atm.mjs evidence run` commands for the same task can race on the same `.atm/history/evidence/<task>.json` bundle, risking overwritten validator records.
expectedBehavior: Evidence writes for a task should be serialized, append/CAS-protected, or brokered so parallel validators cannot silently clobber each other's results.
evidenceOrRepro: ATM-GOV-0186 evidence collection launched multiple evidence runs against `.atm/history/evidence/ATM-GOV-0186.json`; the operator had to rerun validators sequentially to restore confidence.
followUp: Add a task-scoped evidence write lease or append-only event journal plus a focused race test that runs two evidence writers concurrently and verifies both records survive.
